---
title: "Exercise 3 - Sick-Sicker microsimulation with time dependency"
subtitle: 'Includes individual characteristics: age, age dependent mortality, individual treatment effect modifer, state-residency for the sick (S1) state, increasing change of death in the first 6 year of sickness'
author: "The DARTH workgroup"
---

[Download data: ‘mortProb_age.csv’](../exercises/exe3-mortProb_age.csv)   

[Download data: ‘MyPopulation-AgeDistribution.csv’](../exercises/exe3-MyPopulation-AgeDistribution.csv)   

[Download excercise template](../exercises/exe3-microsim_Sick-Sicker_time_exercise_template.Rmd)
